_meta.dataSource: Training knowledge. WebFetch denied in environment.
_meta.scope: shadcn/ui + Tailwind UI + Radix + OriginUI + MagicUI for JobHub redesign

jobCard.source: shadcn/ui Card + OriginUI card-07/card-08 horizontal variants
jobCard.why: shadcn Card gives bare Card/CardHeader/CardContent skeleton with zero opinionated styling. OriginUI card-07/08 add horizontal layout (logo left, details right) mapping 1:1 to job card anatomy. List view = horizontal, grid view = vertical — both from same primitive.
jobCard.customization: Background var(--bg-2), border var(--border), group-hover:border-purple-600/40 + -translate-y-0.5. Custom Badge for type/salary/remote. Border-radius rounded-2xl.

searchFilter.source: shadcn Sheet (mobile drawer) + Accordion + Checkbox + Slider + TailwindUI sidebar filter pattern
searchFilter.why: Sheet handles mobile filter drawer (slide-in) with no z-index work. Accordion collapses filter groups cleanly. Radix Slider for salary range = accessible dual-thumb. TailwindUI Filters-on-sidebar ecommerce pattern is closest proven analog.
searchFilter.customization: TailwindUI white bg → var(--bg-1). Accordion trigger border-bottom var(--border). Checkbox accent-purple ring. Sticky sidebar on desktop (top-20 h-[calc(100vh-5rem)] overflow-y-auto).

candidateDashboard.source: shadcn Dashboard-01 sidebar layout + Tabs + OriginUI timeline for application status
candidateDashboard.why: Dashboard-01 ships collapsible sidebar nav + main content area matching candidate portal structure (Saved Jobs / Applications / Profile / Settings). OriginUI stepper/timeline renders status progression (PENDING → REVIEWING → ACCEPTED/REJECTED) better than plain Badge.
candidateDashboard.customization: Sidebar bg var(--bg-1), active nav item gradient-text + bg-purple/10 pill. Timeline dots: green ACCEPTED, red REJECTED, yellow REVIEWING, muted PENDING.

employerDashboard.why: Dashboard-02 = stat cards + chart + recent-activity table, exactly the employer analytics shape (views, applications, conversion). shadcn DataTable (TanStack v8) handles applicant list with sorting, row selection for bulk status-update, column visibility — no custom table code.
employerDashboard.customization: Stat cards: bg-bg-2, icon in gradient circle, delta badge green/red. Chart: Recharts AreaChart gradient fill purple → transparent. Table row hover bg-bg-3.

adminTable.source: shadcn DataTable (TanStack Table v8) + Dashboard-05 layout
adminTable.why: DataTable + TanStack handles 10k+ rows via @tanstack/react-virtual, built-in column visibility, multi-sort, bulk row selection (ban/unban, approve/reject). Dashboard-05 adds full-width table with toolbar matching admin panel reqs.
adminTable.customization: Toolbar bg-bg-1, header bg-bg-2 sticky, alternating row bg-bg-0/bg-bg-2. Bulk action bar slides up from bottom (fixed) when rows selected.

forms.source: shadcn Form (RHF + Zod) + manual step state + react-dropzone + Tiptap for rich text
forms.why: shadcn Form wraps RHF with FormField/Item/Label/Message — accessible errors + consistent spacing. Multi-step job post (Basic → Requirements → Preferences → Preview) via manual step state + Framer Motion AnimatePresence (no conflicting form contexts). react-dropzone integrates with existing Cloudinary pipeline. Tiptap headless = HTML output via Controller.
forms.customization: Input/Select/Textarea bg-bg-2 border-border focus:ring-purple/20. Step indicator: numbered circles gradient active. File dropzone dashed border-border, hover:border-purple/40, drag-active:bg-purple/5.

emptyStates.source: OriginUI empty-state components + MagicUI AnimatedList for skeleton feeds
emptyStates.why: OriginUI ships 8 empty-state variants (icon + heading + description + CTA) — usable directly for 'No saved jobs', 'No applications', 'No job posts'. MagicUI AnimatedList renders skeleton cards with staggered shimmer matching existing Framer Motion convention. Skeletons mirror exact card/row shapes — no layout shift.
emptyStates.customization: Empty state icon: 48px in gradient circle bg-purple/10. Skeleton shimmer: bg-gradient-to-r from-bg-2 via-bg-3 to-bg-2 animate-shimmer. CTA = primary gradient style.

blocksToBorrow.name: shadcn Dashboard-01
blocksToBorrow.useFor: Candidate/Employer dashboard shell — collapsible sidebar + topbar + main content

blocksToBorrow.name: shadcn Dashboard-02
blocksToBorrow.useFor: Employer analytics — stat cards + area chart + recent applicants table pre-wired

blocksToBorrow.name: shadcn Dashboard-05
blocksToBorrow.useFor: Admin user/job management — full-width DataTable + search toolbar + column visibility

blocksToBorrow.name: shadcn Authentication-01
blocksToBorrow.useFor: Login/Register — two-column layout with gradient brand panel

blocksToBorrow.name: TailwindUI Stacked Layout w/ sidebar filters
blocksToBorrow.useFor: Public job listing — top search + left sidebar + job card grid

blocksToBorrow.name: OriginUI card-07 horizontal
blocksToBorrow.useFor: Job card list-view — logo left, title+company+badges center, salary+CTA right

blocksToBorrow.name: MagicUI AnimatedList
blocksToBorrow.useFor: Notification feed + recent-activity in dashboards — staggered entrance

blocksToBorrow.name: MagicUI NumberTicker
blocksToBorrow.useFor: Admin stats + employer metrics — count-up on scroll-into-view

primitivesLayer.useFor: Apply modal, confirm-delete, image preview — auto focus trap + a11y
Industry/JobType/WorkMode/Location dropdowns — keyboard nav + SR out of box
Salary range dual-thumb filter — accessible aria-valuemin/max
Date picker (expiry, exp dates), column filter menus in admin table
Icon-only buttons in admin toolbar + employer actions — prevent unlabeled icon confusion
Row actions in DataTable — Edit/Pause/Delete job; View/Accept/Reject applicant
Candidate dashboard sections (Profile/Applications/Saved), Employer job detail tabs
Filter sidebar collapsible groups + job requirements expand sections

customizationNotes: Critical rule: never use shadcn's default zinc/slate scheme. Remap every CSS var in globals.css — --background: #07070D, --card: #13131E, --border: #252538, --primary: #7C3AED, --ring: rgba(124,58,237,0.3). Prevents generic light-gray shadcn look. Replace all rounded-md defaults with rounded-2xl on cards, rounded-xl on inputs/buttons. Every interactive element needs purple glow on focus (box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(124,58,237,0.15)) replacing default browser outlines. Preserve motion convention: list renders use Framer Motion staggerChildren 0.06s, page sections use whileInView fadeUp. For Radix portal content (Select/Popover/DropdownMenu) explicitly override portal container bg — Radix portals outside component tree and inherit wrong bg if not overridden.
antiPatterns: Using shadcn default --background: white or zinc-50 without remap → light-theme bleed
Using shadcn Card with default shadow-sm → invisible on dark bg; use border + hover glow instead
Using Radix Select default white dropdown without portal override → must override bg-bg-2/border-border
Using MagicUI components with default light shimmer colors → all shimmer needs dark palette
Stacking multiple Framer Motion layout animations on DataTable rows → jank with 50+ rows; use CSS transition only
Using TailwindUI white/gray sidebar directly without full color token swap
Using shadcn Badge default gray pill for job type/status → must use custom colored badge tokens
Using external stepper library for multi-step forms → conflicts with RHF context; use manual step + AnimatePresence
